title: Petition
description: A request to the synthetic board for a board meeting on a specific question.

petition_id.description: UUID v4. Generated by the submitter.

submitter.description: Free-form identifier for the founder. Optional in MVP.

meeting_type.description: Which meeting protocol to run. MVP supports idea_screen only.

pitch.description: The founder's pitch. Roughly one paragraph, 50-1000 words. The board reads this as the proposed venture.

context.description: Optional additional context: market data, founder background, prior attempts. The board may reference this; it is not the pitch.

attachments.description: URIs of attachments. Ignored in MVP.

constraints.description: Optional founder-set constraints on the meeting.
